name: Cong "Joe" Vu
role: Full-Stack Developer
bio: As a Full-Stack Developer, I bring over five years of experience in building and deploying scalable web and mobile applications. Additionally, I have more than one year of expertise in the blockchain field.
about:
Hello, my name is Cong, but you can call me Joe.
I started my career as a mobile developer using React Native, gradually evolving to build systems from scratch and ensuring their continuous maintenance and updates. Furthermore, I've gained experience in blockchain projects, involving the development and interaction of smart contracts within a React environment, although specifics cannot be disclosed due to privacy policies.

companies.description: As a member of a freelance full-stack developer team, I collaborated with clients from Vietnam and the United States, continuously pursuing avenues for professional advancement.
job: Proficient in time-tracking software (e.g., HubStaff) with activity levels consistently exceeding 75%. Skilled in blockchain system development and smart contract management across testnet and mainnet environments. Demonstrated initiative in building presale websites and admin dashboards.

Experienced in projects involving smart contract-based purchases and integration of third-party services. Proficient in managing user tokens utilizing a Node.js server. Successfully led teams of 2-3 members while managing multiple projects concurrently.

companies.description: At Bright Software Solution, I collaborated with clients from Sweden, India, and diverse European countries, prioritizing new technologies and adaptability in work. Key responsibilities and achievements include:
job: Developed and maintained a mobile application for teachers to manage students, classes, and a CMS to manage employees and sessions.
Created web and mobile applications in the education sector to facilitate interaction between students and teachers through video calls and real-time features.
Participated in the code review process, providing feedback to ensure code quality and consistency.

Collaborated with client-side design teams to craft clean, responsive UI designs. Managed a web application dedicated to promoting events for schools and communities. Actively engaged in code reviews, providing constructive feedback to uphold code quality and coherence.
Sent to work onsite at partner companies for about six months, which yielded good results.

companies.description: During my tenure at Rabiloo, I served Japanese clients and undertook the following responsibilities:
job: Developed a mobile application facilitating cleaner bookings, incorporating features such as payments, chat functionality, and map integration.
Worked closely with the test and design teams daily to ensure high-quality deliverables.
Received recognition as one of the Top 5 new employees of the year in 2018.

companies.description: During my time at my first company, I developed internal projects, contributing significantly to my learning and growth. Specifically, I:
job: Built and maintained a mobile application designed for managing employees, classes, sessions, check-ins, and check-outs utilizing Wi-Fi connections.
Actively participated in the process of releasing the application to the store, gaining valuable experience in the deployment and distribution of mobile applications.
Participated in the company's design and design mindset courses to improve my knowledge of user experience.

projects.title: Blockchain Project (ICO Token)

composition.role: Comprised myself as the main developer and one main designer

role: Developed essential project components, including a landing page, client dashboard, and admin dashboard using React. Additionally, a Node.js server managed backend operations.
description: Phase 1 - Smart Contract Integration for Presale Purchases: Led the implementation of smart contracts to facilitate presale token purchases.

Phase 2 - Transition to Third-Party Service: Implemented third-party services for automating token transactions, enhancing efficiency, scalability, and user experience. Enabled automatic asset transfers to client wallets, streamlining processes and ensuring seamless digital asset management.
In summary, we employed smart contracts and third-party services to enable user participation in the presale while efficiently managing their assets, addresses, and accounts

projects.title: Fitness Mobile Application

composition.role: One project manager, one designer, one backend developer, and one frontend developers (me)

role: Contributed to developing the mobile user interface.
Provided support for backend APIs as needed to ensure seamless integration between the frontend and backend components of the app
Researched Azure Portal APIs and authored integration documents for the development team.
Wrote Azure Pipeline scripts for automated deployment of new app versions to Expo Go
description: Fitness mobile app was designed to provide users with personalized workout courses focusing on specific muscle groups.

projects.title: GrapeSEED Connect
projects.subtitle: Stream Learning Platform

composition.role: React Native developers and one main QA

collaboration: Coordinated with the client for design integration and backend connectivity. Worked closely with the other developer to ensure timely delivery and quality of the application
role: Led the development of the application, developed and implemented key features
Reviewed code to ensure quality and adherence to best practices
description: An online English learning application, with a focus on facilitating interaction between students and teachers through streaming platforms.

Used React Native and WebRTC to develop real-time video streaming capabilities, facilitating seamless interaction between students and teachers and significantly improving the online learning experience.

projects.title: Work Management
projects.subtitle: Projects Management
description: Management of project lifecycle(s), including overseeing tasks and processes of team members, among other responsibilities.

composition.role: One backend developer, mobile and frontend developers (me), and QA team

role: Involved frontend and mobile development while also providing assistance to the backend developer as needed.

projects.title: The Iconist
projects.subtitle: Media Social
description: A social platform designed for sharing random images curated by moderators.

composition.role: One full-stack developer (me), and one intern frontend developer

role: Implemented both the backend infrastructure using Firebase and the frontend components.
Supervised and mentored a frontend intern, guiding them in frontend development tasks.

projects.title: E-Heart
projects.subtitle: Medical Booking
role: Researched and implemented the Orchard framework meticulously, ensuring alignment with customer requirements throughout the development process.
description: An online platform where patients can conveniently book appointments at clinics located near them.

projects.title: Dance School
projects.subtitle: School Management
description: A comprehensive school management system designed to efficiently manage classrooms, students, and class schedules, including reminder functionalities.

composition.role: One full-stack developer (me), mobile and frontend developers, and QA team

role: Created APIs to facilitate communication between the frontend and backend components of the school management system.
Supported frontend developers as needed, assisting with any frontend-related issues or tasks.

projects.title: Miles At Sea
projects.subtitle: Travel Tracking
description: An application for tracking and logging distance traveled, with rewards earned based on completing quests along the route.
role: Integrated Google Maps API to enable distance tracking functionality within the application.
Developed and implemented the mobile user interface to ensure a seamless and intuitive user experience.

projects.title: Vio Studio
description: The concept aims to provide students with real-time information about current and upcoming events in their vicinity.

composition.role: One project manager, one designer, two backend developers, and two frontend developers (me)

role: Created the user interface to ensure an intuitive and engaging experience for students.
Managed frontend tasks, including task allocation and progress tracking.
collaboration: Cooperated closely with backend developers to ensure seamless integration of frontend and backend components.
Collaborated with the designer to define design concepts into functional and visually appealing user interfaces.

projects.title: Osouji
projects.subtitle: Cleaner booking

composition.role: One project manager, one designer, two backend developers, two frontend developer (me), and QA team

role: My primary focus was on developing and implementing the mobile user interface for the job marketplace application.
Collaborated with other team members to ensure seamless integration of the mobile UI with backend functionalities and payment systems.
description: The concept revolves around creating a job marketplace focused on services related to house cleaning and hotels, integrating payment systems and providing directions for seamless transactions.
